plan: 1. Domain layer: Implement `filterByTier(cards: Card[], tiers: Set<Tier>): Card[]` in `src/domain/filterCards.ts` — returns all cards when the set is empty, filters to matching tiers otherwise. Pure function, no mutation.

3. UI component: Create `src/ui/TierFilter/TierFilter.tsx` with props `{ activeTiers: Set<Tier>, onToggle: (tier: Tier) => void, onClear: () => void }`. Render three toggle buttons (Open, Working, Deep) with colored tier indicators using design tokens. Show a 'Clear filters' button when any tier is active. Use `aria-pressed` for accessibility.

4. TierFilter styling: Create `src/ui/TierFilter/TierFilter.module.css` — pill-shaped buttons with tier-colored indicators (green/orange/blue from tokens.css), active state backgrounds using tier background tokens, focus-visible ring for keyboard nav.

5. Integrate into BrowseAllCards: In `src/features/browse/BrowseAllCards.tsx`, add `useState<Set<Tier>>(new Set())` for activeTiers state, a toggle handler that creates a new Set (immutable), and a clear handler. Render `<TierFilter>` above the card grid. Chain filters: `filterByText(filterByTier(cardDeck, activeTiers), searchQuery)`.

6. Unit tests for filterByTier: In `tests/unit/filter-cards.test.ts` — test empty set returns all cards, single tier filters correctly, multiple tiers combine additively, no array mutation, order preservation.

7. Component tests for TierFilter: In `tests/unit/tier-filter.test.tsx` — renders 3 buttons with text labels, toggle calls onToggle with correct tier, aria-pressed reflects active state, clear button shows only when filters active, keyboard accessible.

8. Integration tests for BrowseAllCards: In `tests/unit/browse-all-cards.test.tsx` — tier filter toggles reduce card count, multiple tiers can be active simultaneously, clear filters restores all 57 cards, card count label updates.
9. Run verification: `npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test` to confirm all checks pass.
10. Optional: Run `npm run test:e2e` to verify browse page still functions correctly with tier filters.
testing_recommendations: Unit test filterByTier with empty set (returns all), single tier, multiple tiers, all three tiers, and edge case of no matching cards
Unit test filterByTier does not mutate input array and preserves card order
Component test TierFilter renders Open/Working/Deep buttons with text labels (not color-only)
Component test TierFilter toggle interaction fires onToggle with correct Tier value
Component test TierFilter aria-pressed reflects active/inactive state for accessibility
Component test TierFilter clear button only visible when at least one tier is active
Integration test BrowseAllCards: toggling a tier filter reduces displayed cards to only that tier
Integration test BrowseAllCards: activating multiple tiers shows union of those tiers
Integration test BrowseAllCards: clear filters restores full 57-card deck
Integration test BrowseAllCards: card count label updates when filters change
E2E test: browse page loads with tier filter buttons visible and functional
risks: filterByCategories is exported from src/domain/index.ts but not yet implemented (US-011) — avoid breaking this export or conflating tier and category filter logic
Tier filter must remain visually and logically separate from future category filters (US-011) to avoid coupling
Accessibility: tier colors alone are insufficient — must always include text labels per project requirements
